---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for swiftpredict-v2
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ManasRanjanJena253
---

## Summary

A one or two sentence summary of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What limitation or gap does this address? What are you currently unable to do, or what takes more effort than it should?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you have in mind. If it involves a code change, describe which file or function it would touch.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Are You Willing to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR for this
- [ ] I can help but would need guidance
- [ ] No, I am just suggesting it
